tasks.objective: Clone https://github.com/Akshanshkaushal/gitagent-refactor into /tmp/target-repo and refactor the entire codebase: replace callbacks with async/await, add input validation, extract magic strings/numbers to constants, remove dead code/unused imports, add JSDoc comments to exported functions

steps.description: Cloned repo. Found 3 non-git files: agent.yaml, SOUL.md, RULES.md. No JS/TS source files with actual code to refactor.
